20001.question_text:
Q.1 [11916616] 
												If two vertices of a rhombus are (3,0) and (4,5), and the third
													vertex lies on the point of intersection
													of x + y = 3 and x – 5y = –21, then find the fourth vertex.

20002.question_text:
Q.2 [11916616] 
											Ashok, Kiran and Vignesh are set out to do some work. Ashok can do
												the work in as much time as
												Kiran and Vignesh can do while working together. Kiran can do the work
												alone in 12 days more than
												the days in which Ashok would do the work alone, while Vignesh can work
												twice as fast as Kiran. If
												Shirin joins the work on the second day and the work is finished on that
												day itself, find out how
												many days would Shirin take to complete the whole work by herself?

20003.question_text:
Q.3 [11916616]  A circle is
										inscribed in a regular hexagon and further a square of side 'a' is inscribed
										inside that circle
										as shown in the figure below. Find the area of the shaded region.

20004.question_text:
Q.4 [11916616]  If x is real
									number, then find the minimum value of

20005.question_text:
Q.5 [11916616]  A man spends
								exactly Rs. 810 for buying caps and gloves at Rs. 30 and Rs. 70 respectively. What
								is the ratio of number of gloves to that of caps, if he purchased maximum possible
								number of
								gloves?

20006.question_text:
Q.6 [11916616]  A solution of acid and
							water contains 20% acid in it. What percentage of water must be evaporated
							from the solution to get a 50% acid solution?

20007.question_text:
Q.7 [11916616]  A clock was 10 minutes
						behind the actual time at 1 pm on Monday. It was 20 minutes ahead the
						actual time in the next 144 hrs. When would it be 5 minutes ahead of actual time?

20008.question_text:
Q.8 [11916616]  The average salary of marketing
					department, having 22 employees working, of ABC company is 3.7
					lac more than the average salary of operations department, having 15 employees working, of same
					company. If the average salary of all 37 employees is 5.6 lacs, find the average salary (in lac) of
					marketing department.

20009.question_text:
Q.9 [11916616]  P, Q and R are the roots of the
					equation x3 + bx2 + cx + d = 0, and are positive integers. If P2 +
					Q2 = 221
					and Q2 + R2 = 125, then which of the following can be the value of ‘c’?

20010.question_text:
Q.10 [11916616]  A function is defined as f(x)
					= ax4 + bx3 + cx2 + dx2 + e such that (x2 –
					1) is a factor of f(x). If f(x)
					intersects the y-axis at (0, –10), then find the value of (b + e).

20011.question_text:
Q.11 [11916616]  There are 7 students
					S1, S2, S3, S4, S5, S6 and
					S7, in a class. The respective ratio of heights of
					S1,S2,S4 and S5 is 15 : 16 : 9 : 8, and that of
					S2, S3, S6 and S7 is 8 : 5 : 11 : 12. If height of
					S7 is 16 cm more than that of S2, then find the sum of height (in cm) of
					S4, S5 and S6.

20012.question_text:
Q.12 [11916616]  In a Carom competition,
					involving some boys and some girls, every person had to play exactly one
					game with every other person. It was found that in 45 games both the players were girls and in 190
					games both were boys. The number of games in which both, a girl and a boy, were present is
					(assume competition had to be held only between two players at a time)

20013.question_text:
Q.13 [11916616]  A cake factory has 36 baking
					machines, 60 filling machines and 144 jacking machines. If the
					manager of the factory decides to place equal number of machine in each row such that each row
					has machines of same category, then what is the least number of rows required?

20014.question_text:
Q.14 [11916616]  If log2 x =
					log8 y = m, and x and y are positive integers, then find logx y.

20015.question_text:
Q.15 [11916616]  The sum of all the real roots
					of the equation |x – 4|2 + |x – 4| – 6 = 0 is

20016.question_text:
Q.16 [11916616]  Abhijit bought 100 HCC’s
					shares at Rs. 157 each, 10 Reliance’ shares at Rs.1000 each, 20 State
					Bank of India’s shares at Rs. 1560 each, and 5 Jindal Steel’s shares at Rs. 3350 each. If he sold
					all
					these shares for Rs.161, Rs.957, Rs.1559 and Rs.3800 per share respectively, then his approximate
					percentage of profit or loss is

20017.question_text:
Q.17 [11916616]  There are two equations,
					x2 + bx + c = 0 and x2 + cx + b = 0, where b ≠ 0 and c ≠ 0. If both the
					equations have integral roots, then what can be said about the value of 'c'?
options:
There is only one value of 'c' at which it is equal to
					'b'.

20018.question_text:
Q.18 [11916616]  Surya has to pay back the
					total loan plus interest, where the interest is of Rs. 441 earned at the rate
					of 10% compounded annually in 2 years, on the loan. Had Surya decided to pay it in two equal
					installments at same rate of interest then he would have saved Rs. x. Find the value of x.

20019.question_text:
Q.19 [11916616]  The sum of 3rd and 28th term
					of an Arithmetic Progression is same as that of 7th, 11th and 18th
					term of the Arithmetic Progression. If the sum of the first N terms of this Arithmetic Progression
					is
					zero, then find the value of N.

20020.question_text:
Q.20 [11916616]  Find the remainder when F(a) =
					a15 + a14 + a13 +.....+ a2 + a is divided by
					(a2 – 1).

20021.question_text:
Q.21 [11916616]  ABC is an isosceles right
					angle triangle, right angled at A. One more isosceles right angle triangle,
					MBC, is drawn taking BC as its hypotenuse. Now taking M as center and MB as radius a circle is
					drawn. What percentage (approx) of area of the triangle ABC lies within the circle?

20022.question_text:
Q.22 [11916616]  A and B run in opposite
					direction around a circular track of radius 140 m. The speed of A is 7m/s
					whereas speed of B is 3m/s. Whenever they are at a distance of 10 m on the track they say hello
					or bye to each other. Find the number of times A said hello or bye to B till the time A has covered
					a
					total distance of 12320 m.
